items.name: Ruckus Zone List
items.description: Fetches all zones with full domain hierarchy paths. Falls back to flat zone list if /domains is unavailable. Used by Zone Discovery.

items.name: Ruckus AP List (Zone {$SMARTZONE_ZONE_ID})
items.description: AP list for the zone set in {$SMARTZONE_ZONE_ID}. Master item for AP host discovery. Auto re-authenticates if JSESSIONID expires.

item_prototypes.name: {#ZONE_PATH}

macros.description: Max APs fetched per zone. Each AP needs 1 extra HTTP call for IP — raise only if proxy Timeout allows.
SmartZone 100 admin password — used for auto re-auth when JSESSIONID expires
Active session cookie: JSESSIONID=<value> from POST /wsg/api/public/v6_1/session
SmartZone 100 admin username — used for auto re-auth when JSESSIONID expires
Zone ID for AP host discovery. Set to the zone whose APs you want as Zabbix hosts.
SNMP community string for discovered AP hosts
